hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; for PAT in "eval(" "exec(" "pickle.load" "yaml.load" "import fastapi" "from fastapi" "import starlette" "from starlette" "import uvicorn"; do if echo "$CMD" | grep -qi "$PAT" 2>/dev/null; then echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Blocked by Contract 1/9: $PAT is a banned pattern in engine code. See tools/contract_scanner.py.\"}" && exit 0; fi; done; echo "{\"decision\": \"approve\"}"'
bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && command -v ruff &>/dev/null; then ruff check --select=SEC,ARCH "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'

bash -c 'if command -v python3 &>/dev/null && [ -f tools/contract_scanner.py ]; then python3 tools/contract_scanner.py --quick 2>/dev/null || echo "Contract scanner found issues — review before committing"; fi'
